div.head: 151. Editorial Note
div.p: The Central Intelligence Agency prepared a Special National Intelligence Estimate, SNIE 10-3-61, “Probable Communist Reactions to Certain SEATO Undertakings in South Vietnam.” The text of this paper is printed in United States-Vietnam Relations, 1945-1967, Book 11, pages 313-321; although no copy has been found. The printed text does not include the usual cover sheet indicating that the estimate was approved by the appropriate intelligence agencies.
